name: Vegetable Broth
recipeIngredient: 2 Leeks, both white and green, washed and sliced
1 Green part of the fennel bulb, or 1 whole bulb, sliced
3 Unpeeled garlic cloves, cut in half
4 Fresh thyme sprigs OR 1 tablespoon dried thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except peppercorns and wine in a 4-quart pot.
2. Pour over just enough water to cover, then heat on high until the liquid comes to a boil.
3. Turn down the heat, cover the pot, and keep the broth at a slow simmer.
4. After vegetables have simmered for 30 minutes, add peppercorns and white wine. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Strain through a medium-mesh strainer into a clean pot or heat-resistant plastic container.
6. Let the broth cool, uncovered, for at least one hour before refrigerating.
